page_content:
Scholarships and Financial Assistance

The Ofﬁce of Student Financial Aid (OSFA) administers all types of federal, state, and institutional ﬁnancial assistance programs and, in cooperation with other university ofﬁces, participates in the awarding of scholarships to deserving students. For information visit their website (https://ﬁnancialaid.umd.edu/).

Scholarships administered by the INFO College for undergraduate students include:
